query:
SELECT 1 as "exists!: i64"
         FROM tags t
         JOIN dimensions d ON d.id = t.dimension_id
         JOIN dimension_values dv ON dv.id = t.value_id
         WHERE t.sample_id = ?
           AND t.is_primary = 1
           AND d.name = 'Type'
           AND dv.value = 'loop'
         LIMIT 1
